codeReview.summary: Feature implemented correctly. Created event_log.rs module in swell-memory with EventLog struct for append-only JSONL storage, EventLogEntry with schema versioning (v1.0), 9 event types with typed payloads, builder pattern for optional IDs, replay iterators for full and task-filtered replay, and 11 comprehensive tests. All expected behaviors covered.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript skeleton is null for this worker session. The worker did not provide structured step-by-step transcript output. Handoff exists but contains only summary-level information, not the granular tool-by-tool execution log.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: jq -s query for worker session b152a008 returned transcriptSkeleton: null. Only handoff.salientSummary and handoff.whatWasImplemented are available.

summary: Feature mem-event-log-jsonl passes review. Implementation fully covers all 3 expected behaviors: JSONL format append, schema versioning per entry (v1.0), and replay capability. Code quality is good with proper error handling and comprehensive test coverage (11 tests). No blocking issues.
